reviews.review_description: I bought this game on a whim because I really like pinball games (misspent youth). Really enjoyed the pinball element in this game; however, the cut scenes in between do tend to take you out of the pinball experience. Not a real issue as it might be essential to the story but I do wish there was a standalone pinball mode where you can just play pinball for the points without the hindrance of cutscenes.  If you are on the fence about getting this game, I will say that get it. It is one hell of an entertaining game.

Just buy it! 

This is a very simple game, hit the balls on the targets with heavy metal music ripping through your head holes...

A highly addictive!

Update: 
Love the new updates. Having a loop that has an ending was perfect for this game!

reviews.review_title: love everything except the main pinball
reviews.review_description: I love all the whacky stuff (story/voice/art) and the music, but the main game -- the first-person pinball -- gets boring quickly. I'm already bored at 10~20 minutes.
It’s a short, low-effort production with a bunch of generic metal music, mediocre gameplay, and repetitive story elements. But it’s a lot of fun, and totally worth $3.
Great presentation and very cool being "inside" shooting balls for mid-air control, bringing a whole new dimension to things!

reviews.review_title: Heavy Metal / Cats ! / and balls Yeah!!!
reviews.review_description:
This game's soundtrack is pumping dudes and since the introduction of the cats pinball machine and backgrounds, has taken this game to off the hook.
The addictiveness of achieving all the parts needed to get to the next level without missing is amazing. and not an easy feat I may add. 


I have poured hours into this game and it's full on.
See your name in the leaderboards and work your way up them.
Pick a song then try to hit that skill shot. What a feeling of triumph right there !
The feeling of just one more try is always there and has you on edge as you mutter to yourself I can do this 
I highly recommend this game to fans of heavy metal music and if you like a challenge that ties in well with pinball.
Don't worry if you mess up just try try again!
 
This game is so much fun. 

Don't miss this one folks a rythmic game that brings the glory with added KICK.

I was like metal pinball?okay cool ! this is going to be .cool! And I bought it and it's really lame... I guess I should have watched a video before I bought it or something it doesn't do anything this game is so boring

developer_response.body: Oh no! Thanks for your feedback drewvigil. I believe Oculus has a 48 hour refund policy, you might still be within the time limit.  I hope you keep playing and feedback on how I can improve my game.

reviews.review_description: Had great fun playing, jumping between playing pinball in VR and then scaling down and being IN the pinball machine. Awesome!
Awesome metal to jam along with whilst smashing everything with a wrecking ball sized pinball! Point and shoot, or use the paddles to wreak havoc to the sounds of Death Animal.

reviews.review_title: Possibly the best game ever made!
reviews.review_description: And it keeps getting better!

There are several options of pinball games in VR but Metal Multiball is the only one that I've come across thus far that actually puts you INSIDE the machine.  It is a unique perspective and makes for a very fun game as you play through the different venues and listen to the metal soundtrack, trying to hit the targets to advance to the next location.

I've played Metal Multiball on Go, Rift and Quest and the Quest version is the one I'd recommend if you're looking to pick this one up!

A giant pinball machine. Multiple balls. A 6 tentacled catapus. This game is a really good time and I drove my family crazy playing “just one more ball.” 

Chaos and delight. Buy it immediately.
this is great you hit everything with pinballs plus its a band on stage playing rock or heavy metal this rules

Had very good time playing it, fast paced and very well done. Good job with audio also and your voice overs :)
If you consider buying it, don't think anymore and just get it!
So fun!

Omg is this game sick, blown away with it truly.
Hey Steve maybe some pyro for the band next. Love this a lot!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Great combo of Heavy Metal and Pinball.
reviews.review_description: If you like heavy metal music and a fun, frantic, immersive pinball game then this is perfect.
my favorite game of 2022 and more years the best rock and heavy metal game to play

this game starts from a totally original idea that deserves to be developed and improved! you're basically on a pinball plane! even the metal rock themed setting is absolutely original. you have to review all the graphics (too basic) that need more care and evolution. moreover it takes other songs also of another style with different environments. in short, a game that must not be left as it is absolutely but must develop many aspects. the idea is excellent and one of a kind. for what it costs I recommend to all pinball lovers to buy it! but I hope in the future to see this game at a higher price because it is updated!

developer_response.body:
Thank you ray-x
METAL MULTIBALL Quest 2/Pro versions have been upgraded

reviews.review_description: my favorite game of 2021 who would not like hitting all the musicians merch sound guy fans and all the monitors signs and other stuff plus i love the cute cat
